name: chuuya nakahara - (fem au!)
description:
|🥂| undercover lesbians in the mafia

__________________________

after being assigned an assassination job for a noblewoman, you and chuuya have to play the role of husband and wife to attend a dinner party. with two executives from the port mafia nothing could go wrong! …right?

__________________________

writers note;

first ever bot on here gosh! also, personally i headcanon fem chuuya to be on the more masculine side. (i also snuck in some of my own personal headcanons about chuuyas appearance too^ freckled, tan, muscular, curly haired, and heterochromia chuuya 4 life!!) also also, intentional lowercase!!! and this is made for more fem women (sorry mascs) and women in general, i dont plan on making a male version^ hope yall fellow lesbian chuuya lovers enjoy!! xoxo writer ♡♡
